notes: Blind benchmark run. Validator script could not execute due to sandbox Bash permissions; edge visibility constraint and coordinate-range checks were performed manually against validator logic (Read of validate_owm.mjs confirmed the three rules: coords in [0,1]; endpoints declared; nu(src) >= nu(tgt)). 47 components, 5 anchors, 96 edges. Component-density target band: 40-55 (multi-stakeholder).
